feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Strange Gravity
entry.summary:
Author: aeternus_diamant

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,515Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Mordred has been quietly, devastatingly in love with Merlin since September — since a guest lecture on myth and memory where Merlin said something offhand and brilliant and Mordred's entire brain rearranged itself. He signed up for Merlin's tutorial section like a man with no self-preservation instincts. Merlin, PhD candidate and professional disaster, is completely oblivious. For now.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 95,461Chapters: 63/?Kudos: 32

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: Not dead or dying
entry.summary:
Author: lindenwaverly

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,520Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: Merlin and Leon, 2026, discuss the problems of immortality. “I think,” said Merlin slowly. He was very drunk. He was also on the floor. The floor was all right, really. He shouldn’t have complained so much about sleeping on them, back in the day. “I think - Leon, what do I think?”  “I have heard everything you think,” said Leon, lying next to him with his hands over his chest, “for over a thousand bloody years.”  “Right!” Merlin slapped his arm. “Leon, I think I might have found a way to kill myself.”  Very, very slowly, Leon turned his head. It took a full minute for him to finally face Merlin. “You’re not allowed.”  “Ahah! I thought you’d say that. So I’ve worked out a way to kill you too.”  “Right.” Leon shut his eyes. “Yay.”

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Amber and Wild Thyme
entry.summary:
Author: Ginkgo_Biloba_Baggins

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,900Chapters: 14/33Kudos: 385

Summary: When Hunith arrives in Camelot with news of an attack, Merlin knows what he has to do. He is perfectly capable of driving away the likes of Kanen’s men by himself; he has been defending Ealdor since he was ten years old. However, he has no idea of the lengths Arthur will go to to protect his poor, misguided manservant - such as adopting a disguise and following him home. A Canon Era AU of S1 E10 The Moment of Truth

entry.summary:
Author: BlueGrassSax

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,402Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 14

entry.title: The teenager you never got to be
entry.summary:
Author: AriasAstro

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,570Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 27

Summary: Mordred never meant to be knighted while being a teenager. It just sort of, happened. Yes, it was against the law to be a knight and be under 18 summers old, but that wasn't Mordred's fault. On top of that, Mordred was much more than a simple 15 year old. With Morgana back in Camelot and everyone happier, Mordred can't help but think something will happen. And, something does in fact happen. After an incident in training, everyone finds out about Mordred's true age. After that, the people around Mordred find out more and more about how much Mordred has truly been hiding from them. Things that all of them wished they could fix. Or The knights of Camelot (+merlin) find out that Mordred is not even 16 years old. They are not amused. Now, Mordred is being treated like a child by everyone around him. But after he's been through... maybe it's for the best?

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,820Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 8

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: How Fatherhood Changes a Man (and Certain Policies of State)
entry.summary:
Author: mayoInYourWalls

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 92,738Chapters: 17/20Kudos: 67

Summary: Most everyone Merlin knew warned him that nothing good would ever come of his little (though astonishingly requited) crush on the Lady Morgana. Merlin was, as of now, finding himself in agreement, as she made her dramatic return to Camelot one year after Merlin had attempted to kill her with hemlock. But when Merlin discovers the child, his child, he can say at least one very good thing, as well many more exceedingly ridiculous and complicated things, certainly had come of it. Featuring pervasive passive aggression and a general sense of melancholy, an extended and distinctly non peaceful political process to legalising magic, a not entirely willing family trip to Ealdor, and some foreign diplomatic negotiations somewhat lacking in diplomacy.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Absolution of the Son
entry.summary:
Author: LadyWhistleClown

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,185Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 64

Summary: Arthur is angry when he learns that he is born of magic and that his Father sacrificed his Mother so he could have an heir. In this version of events, Merlin doesn't tell Arthur that Morgause lied to him. Arthur must confront his Father and face Camelot's history of discriminatory anti-magic policies head on, including his own role in them. All while he feels himself slowly drawn closer and closer to his manservant Merlin. Meanwhile, Merlin must continue to keep his magic secret and work in the shadows for the better future with Arthur he's been promised is his destiny.

entry.title: if you are justice, please do not lie
entry.summary:
Author: daseydaisy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,420Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 25

Summary: “Can I help you?” The man shoved past him, not even the slightest bit put off by the biosteel onesie in red and gold. He unlocked the purple door with a wave of his hand (that’s not right, Arthur’s brain insisted) and shoved it open. “Sorry, I just…” All the words he wanted to say died somewhere between his brain and his mouth. Everything felt wrong but his heart eased up for the first time since he woke up in the middle of what he assumed was a park with a head injury and no memories. He pulled in a deep breath, set his shoulders, and tried again. “I think I belong to you.” There was a tense moment where neither man breathed. Or Superhero Arthur gets amnesia and decides to crash on Merlin's couch while Merlin's doing his best to "save" the city.

  • Colin Connors (Reincarnated Lancelot)
  • Daegal
  • Queen Milcah of the Druids
  • Lord Tadg
  • Druids (Merlin)
  • Bradley Carmichael
  • Camelot

  • AU
  • Alternate Universe - Modern Setting
  • Angst and Comfort

  • Trauma Exploration

entry.title: Princes should not eat
entry.summary:
Author: Ladi_albion

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,214Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 71

Summary: Merlin has been especially irritable since Freya's death and finds the perfect outlet in seeing how he can annoy Arthur by teasing him about his weight and how much the prince eats. But it turns out that Arthur Pendragon is much more susceptible to his servant's opinion than he imagines. And so an eating disorder is born. A modern disease that no one understands and that, to Merlin's despair, may prevent Albion's destiny from never being fulfilled.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin & Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Gaius (Merlin)
  • Uther Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Knights of the Round Table (Merlin)
  • Anorexia
  • Eating Disorders
  • Whump
  • Hurt/Comfort
  • Slow Burn
  • Arthur Pendragon Whump (Merlin)

entry.title: Lonely Bird
entry.summary:
Author: gloriask

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,924Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 52

Summary: Where the birth of a child and the death of a beloved occupy the same instant. Arthur held them. Both of them. The living and the dead. His son and his husband. The beginning and the end.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Alternate Universe - Canon Divergence
  • Mpreg | Male Pregnancy
  • Miscarriage
  • Childbirth
  • Death in Childbirth
  • Temporary Character Death
  • Happy Ending
  • Grief/Mourning
  • Parenthood
  • Pregnant Merlin (Merlin)
  • Hurt Merlin (Merlin)
